get.description: Get latest desktop application version for Mac App Store redirect checking.

Admin only.

Admin only.

post.description:

Admin only.

Sync a specific orphaned Firebase user to PostgreSQL.
Admin only.

delete.description:
Delete a user completely from PostgreSQL and attempt to delete from Firebase.
Admin only.

Login with Firebase token.
Verifies the token and returns user information.
Creates a new user if one doesn't exist with the given Firebase UID.

get.description:
Get current user information.
Requires authentication.

post.description:
Save Voice Profile.
Updates the user to indicate they have completed voice enrollment.

Generate a Firebase Custom Token for the authenticated user.
Called by the web app after the user logs in, to hand off auth to the Electron desktop recorder.

Exchange the Short-Lived Code for a Firebase Custom Token.
Called securely behind the scenes by the Electron desktop recorder.

get.description:
Get a presentation for public viewing.
No authentication required.

Proxies an image from Google Cloud Storage to bypass strict CORS requirements
blockages during PPTX/Diagram PDF exports on Railway deployed frontends.
Returns the OAuth authorization URL for Google Drive
OAuth Callback handler. Exchanges code for tokens, binds to user, and redirects to frontend.

post.description:
Receives incoming Webhooks from the GitHub App installed on user repositories.
Processes the X-Hub-Signature-256 headers directly from the raw byte stream to verify authenticity.
Binds a newly installed GitHub App to the current authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a list of repositories accessible to the authenticated user's installed GitHub app.
Returns a list of branches for a specific repository.

post.description:
Transcribe a raw audio chunk uploaded by the Electron recorder.
The Groq API key lives exclusively on the server — it is never sent to the client.

get.description: Retrieves the list of supported AI models and their context limits.

Fetch all email templates for admin preview.

delete.description:
Delete a user account and all associated data (Admin only)
This is a careful operation that deletes all related records to avoid foreign key constraint errors
Only admins can delete other users

Delete your own user account and all associated data
This endpoint allows users to delete their own account without specifying a userId
The user ID is extracted from the authentication token

get.description: Obtiene la lista de Workspaces a los que pertenece el usuario autenticado.

post.description: Creates a new workspace. TEMPORARY: Only allowed for ADMIN users.

get.description: Obtiene la lista de miembros e invitaciones pendientes del Workspace activo.

post.description: Invites a user (existing or new) to the currently active workspace.

put.description: Updates an existing workspace member's role and/or personas.

delete.description:
Removes an active member from the workspace.
OWNER cannot be removed. Requester must be OWNER or ADMIN.

put.description: Updates workspace settings like API keys and token limits.
